_README: STAGED settings.json snippet for the Fable runtime cap (do NOT let an agent arm settings.json).
Apply BOTH pieces below into $HOME/.claude/settings.json (or the project .claude/settings.json)
by hand. This closes the interactive Fable bypass: it pins the default model off Fable (Opus) and
arms the SessionStart guard that loudly warns when an interactive session is on Fable over-cap.
1) Set the top-level default model off Fable:
2) ADD the guard command to the EXISTING SessionStart hook array (append, do not replace the
session-orient entry already there). The command below is the exact validated block.
